Implements WSGI application and Blueprint classes, shared behavior scaffolding, and documentation for IO-free Flask support.


## Files
- **[app.py](app.py.md)**: Implements a WSGI application class for Flask, managing configurations, URL routing, and template handling.
- **[blueprints.py](blueprints.py.md)**: Implements the Blueprint class for defining and registering reusable components in Flask applications.
- **[README.md](README.md.md)**: Documentation for code that supports alternative Flask implementations without IO or Flask globals.
- **[scaffold.py](scaffold.py.md)**: Implements the `Scaffold` class for shared behavior in Flask applications, including routing and error handling.
